_purpose: Append-only log of Mentor agent discovery operations that bypassed the knowledge graph. One JSON object per line. Each entry records a filesystem-first lookup so the graph can later absorb the missing node.

_schema.query: what the agent was looking for
_schema.suggested_node: node id that should have answered, or empty if truly novel
_schema.suggested_fix: one-line action to close the gap

_analyze: Get-Content .github/knowledge-graph/data/discovery-gaps.jsonl | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '_meta' } | ConvertFrom-Json | Group-Object reason | Sort-Object Count -Desc
